<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Upload Codecov Bundle Analysis<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Run Codecov bundle analysis for a built artifact directory.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                    | Description                                                    | Required | Default  |
|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|----------|----------|
| `dist`                  | Directory passed to @codecov/bundle-analyzer.                  | `false`  | `./dist` |
| `bundle-name`           | Codecov bundle name. Defaults to GITHUB_REPOSITORY.            | `false`  | ` `      |
| `upload-token`          | Codecov upload token. When empty, the action skips by default. | `false`  | ` `      |
| `skip-when-token-empty` | Skip instead of failing when upload-token is empty.            | `false`  | `true`   |
| `continue-on-error`     | Warn instead of failing when bundle analysis upload fails.     | `false`  | `true`   |
| `working-directory`     | Directory where the bundle analyzer command runs.              | `false`  | `.`      |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/upload-codecov-bundle-analysis" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Upload bundle analysis to Codecov"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/upload-codecov-bundle-analysis@main"
   with:
    bundle-name: "${{ github.repository }}"
    upload-token: "${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN || '' }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
